nasb.text: In the second month on the fourteenth day at twilight, they shall observe it; they shall eat it with unleavened bread and bitter herbs.

esv.text: In the second month on the fourteenth day at twilight they shall keep it. They shall eat it with unleavened bread and bitter herbs.

cnv.text: 他們要在二月十四日，黃昏的時候，守逾越節，同時要吃無酵餅和苦菜；

ccb.text: 他们可以在二月十四日黄昏守逾越节，要配无酵饼和苦菜一起吃逾越节的羊羔。
